lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to model the exploration fit and engineered jump range.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Orca ship page — manufacturer specs, normal-space speed, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative hull mass, FSD class, core/optional slot sizes and engineering blueprint data behind the loadout tables.

sources.label: Inara — Orca
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, optional-internal layout and shipyard pricing cross-checked for the cost figures.

sources.label: Fandom — Orca
sources.what: Saud Kruger lore, role overview and spec reference backing the dossier write-up.
